transcript: Speaker A (Woman): ನನ್ನ ಗಂಡ ಆಫೀಸ್ ಗೆ ಹೋಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ [My husband went to office] Speaker B (AI): My husband went to office. Speaker A: My husband went to office. Speaker B: ಇವತ್ತು ಅವರು ಲೇಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಬರುತ್ತಾರೆ. He will come late today. [Today he will come late. He will come late today.] Speaker A: He will come late today. Speaker B: ಅವರಿಗೆ ಇಷ್ಟವಾದ ಅಡುಗೆ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀನಿ. I am cooking his favourite food. [I am cooking his favorite food. I am cooking his favourite food.] Speaker A: I am cooking his favourite food. Speaker B: MySivi ಆಪ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. ಅದು ಕೂಡ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದು ರೂಪಾಯಿಗೆ. [Learn English by speaking with me in Kannada on MySivi app. That too for just one rupee.] Speaker C (Voiceover): ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವಾಗ ಬೇಕಾದರೂ ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಮಯ ಬೇಕಾದರೂ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [Practice with me whenever you want, for as long as you want.]
on_screen_text: (English ಬರಲ್ವಾ) [Don't know English?], ನನ್ನ ಗಂಡ officeಗೆ ಹೋಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ [My husband went to office], My husband went, ಇವತ್ತು ಅವರು late ಆಗಿ ಬರುತ್ತಾರೆ [Today they will come late], He will come late today, ಅವರಿಗೆ ಇಷ್ಟವಾದ ಅಡುಗೆ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀನಿ [I am cooking his favorite food], I am cooking his favourite food, MySivi, ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಹೀಗೆ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡುತ್ತಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ [Learn English by speaking with me in Kannada like this], ಅದು ಕೂಡ ಕೇವಲ [That too for just], MySivi Premium: 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A woman practices English by translating Kannada sentences with an AI mirror avatar. The ad promotes the MySivi app, highlighting a 3-day premium trial for ₹1 to practice English conversation anytime.
